creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
I missed 2 new Qt dependencies.

I finally set up a tinderbox to better test updates and now it should be OK.

Also in the meanwhile version 0.8.1 was made, so I updated to that version.

Here is a revised patch.

Thank you for your patience :)

-- 
Guido Falsi <mad@madpilot.net>
